description: Autnio personal AI agent — digital and physical world automation

actionGroups.description: Automate computer tasks: send emails, schedule meetings, fill forms, open applications
Manage files in Box: upload, read, share, search
Web scraping: job board search, research, general data extraction via Apify
Read and write user preferences, routines, and task history in DynamoDB
Computer vision: scene description, OCR, navigation assistance (Dev 4 Lambdas)

notes.SCHEMA_BUCKET: S3 bucket where schema YAMLs are uploaded — set by Dev 3 infra
notes.LAMBDA_ARN_*: Lambda ARNs output by Dev 2 CDK/SAM deployment
